utility_evaluation.REASONING:

6. additional_services: Amenities listed and payment due date, but no explicit cost mentioned ❌ (missing costs)
7. total_budget: Total cost, remaining budget, and notes given ✅
Thus, 6 items are fully covered out of 7.
